74451.body: p{ margin:10px 0; padding:0; } table{ border-collapse:collapse; } h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6{ display:block; margin:0; padding:0; } img,a img{ border:0; height:auto; outline:none; text-decoration:none; 74444.subject: SpaceX rockets on its stock-market debut
74444.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDV9AAcAAAAAAp4H4Um3nzqL78GqSgLEN5ET4aAn6pqhxk7u0kYT4dDq40DbhirpKJYyC_USGVBd4GIBxCxHB8kWcKZ0wKR2r5H3yqBFdcmp9BzBS68A5wWIPw 

June 12th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDV9AAcAAAAAAp4H4Um57qjV9n6FXIyNAnDHhvKMdlHa6CrUr1fopuvBgwi2iLa6lH-HkgCDmWk0paHXEa2_ok5nnIlfGbpnMq29SA3yrjwugIAmjxlhDd9qbA 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDV9AAcAAAAAAp4H4Um6v-dY7SkwEknszRYY7LegUj0gJTeHR-1lulCCmW3cWZck65NfNLR7lTPf9A54gUrd_mDgPA21VojFxEkP4ciqzGr7cqxD_lUQobMSWw 



 
 

Lane Greene

Senior digital editor



 SpaceX has now officially had history’s biggest IPO, and made Elon Musk the world’s first trillionaire. But what are investors actually buying? The loss-making company is betting that AI data centres in space can be made profitable—and that the improbable Mr Musk is the man to 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDV9AAcAAAAAAp4H4Um7VawPQSE6UU7jKKuNtWpy5J_CInFRIVNQrtJR4YGB-y3ZHpRTQx8MPxEYJjY0qo8JAl0vgFKpCh_aeaA96hleO0UdObqU4gHp 
pull off this improbable feat .
 


 And you may think that the World Cup represents the triumph of a kind of global monoculture, as everyone watches the same thing. But global culture is actually becoming 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDV9AAcA

74440.body:
AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: CryptoBeholder.com


Автор: CryptoBeholder.com

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-12-cryptobeholder-ufpdf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BSlOVK4eIScyNekqwpLeKNQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0N-5hMWYTe0ck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqb4ms96~tz-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqb4ms96-tz
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Markets absorb SpaceX's record IPO while regulatory pressures intensify. SBF's fraud conviction stands firm; geopolitical tensions shape crypto's institutional future. 🚀 SpaceX IPO: Largest Listing Ever Reshapes Market Dynamics SpaceX launched the largest IPO in history on June 12, priced at $135 per share with an explosive $75 billion valuation. Crypto derivatives on Hyperliquid valued shares at $177 within hours—a 31% premium—signaling fervent institutional appetite. The IPO creates a new benchmark for tech financing and positions Elon Musk toward trillionaire status. Read full story ⚖️ SBF's 25-Year Sentence Upheld: Fraud Conviction Stands Firm Sam Bankman-Fried lost his appeal as a federal court panel rejected his bid to overturn his fraud conviction on conspiracy charges. The 25-year sentence remains intact, marking a decisive legal blow to the disgraced FTX founder. SBF's only remaining path out is a pardon from President Trump. More details ⚠️ Monero Spike & Tether Blacklist: $120M Laundering Maze Exposed A mysterious $120 million USDT flow through crypto exchanges triggered Monero's price spike to $438, prompting Tether to freeze $72 million in related wallets. Blockchain sleuth ZachXBT traced the activity across multiple platforms and chains, revealing sophisticated laundering patterns. Tether's decisive blacklisting highlights the tension between centralized stablecoin control and decentralized privacy protocols, raising fresh questions about regulatory enforcement. See details 🏦 KuCoin $2M Court Order Still Unpaid: Exchange Compliance Crisis KuCoin has failed to pay a $2 million Seychelles court-ordered award to a Swiss investor involving 21 million delisted CHP tokens, over six months after the ruling. The exchange allegedly classified unwithdrawn tokens as "abandoned," but the court disagreed. This non-compliance signals potential regulatory escalation and raises questions about exchange accountability in treating customer assets fairly—a critical issue for the sector. Read more 🌍 US-Iran 60-Day Nuclear Talks: Geopolitical Tensions Shape Markets The US and Iran agreed to a 60-day nuclear negotiation window with a tentative ceasefire, reducing immediate military escalation risk. The potential "Islamabad Agreement" could stabilize global oil logistics and ease energy supply cons

74430.subject: The SpaceX Test
74430.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eaa70932-7ce4-467e-b338-a662ed575d6a/0xR_NL_Banner_Heading_Wordmark.jpg?t=1776775276)
Caption: 

==Hi everyone. For decades, investors have accepted that stocks only trade during market hours. That assumption is increasingly being challenged. As markets rallied on hopes of easing geopolitical tensions, attention shifted toward today's SpaceX IPO and the growing demand for around-the-clock access to traditional assets. Below, we unpack the latest market action and why SpaceX's arrival on Solana may represent a much bigger shift in market structure==

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/42e942ec-f31d-4957-8722-a3ac7b121e1e/0xR_NL_Market_Update.png?t=1767631151) [Market Update]
Caption: 

After a tough week of price action, markets staged a sharp rebound yesterday with all four major benchmarks ending in the green. Gold and the Nasdaq led the recovery, posting gains of 4.36% and 4.33%, respectively. BTC and the S&P 500 followed closely behind, rising 3.24% and 2.30%.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/86e5d6eb-4d41-4a19-822d-879ce698b738/image.png?t=1781265380)
Caption: 

As has been the case for much of the past month, markets remain highly headline-driven. Risk assets initially sold off after Trump [stated](https://www.businesstimes.com.sg/international/global/trump-vows-strike-iran-thursday-if-it-holds-out-deal) that the US would continue military operations against Iran unless an interim peace agreement was reached. However, the administration later walked back the threat, with Trump [suggesting](https://www.reuters.com/business/wall-st-futures-rise-tech-buying-middle-east-peace-hopes-2026-06-11/) that a deal could be signed as soon as this weekend and that shipping through the Strait of Hormuz could resume shortly thereafter. Markets embraced the optimism, though recent history suggests investors should remain cautious given how fragile previous ceasefire and peace discussions have proven to be.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/ced5108f-f1e8-4e9d-a286-745533ca7900/image.png?t=1781265380)
Caption: 

The relief rally extended across crypto, with every sector closing higher on the day. Perps led the move, gaining 10.8%, with HYPE and LIT continuing their strong run and rising 11.7% and 10.8%, respectively.

Today will be a big day for both markets and Hyperliquid with the much-anticipated IPO of SpaceX. SpaceX is by far the largest pre-IPO market listed to date, averaging roughly $51M in daily volume during its pre-launch phase compared to $4M for CBRS and $3M for QNT. If launch day activity follows
